Precision Intelligence Homes

The Black Series range

Seven forms on one modular grid — every home composed from 4.2 × 8.4 m precision modules, built in the factory and installed on site. Select any home to open its live feasibility.

Import architect drawing set

Load a Fraser & Partners (or any) PDF — pages render below as floor-plan thumbnails you can add to the viewer, and the housing schedule is parsed into a summary table.

Reference architecture

Environmental Living 4DD

Type X.1 · Templestowe · 514.6 m² over two storeys — the flagship Black Series footprint.
Single-home feasibility

Feasibility estimate

Jeffrey's estimating workbook, live. Edit any quantity or rate, add your own cost lines to any section, and adjust the margins — the waterfall recalculates instantly and flows through to every project scenario.

Cost breakdown

Project & subdivision feasibility

Model a development

Build scenarios for a subdivision — define the lot schedule (e.g. 300 lots across size bands), assign a HAAVN home to each band, check the design fits the land, layer in manual adjustments, and roll the whole project up. Every home draws its live feasibility figures.

Lot schedule & land fit

Add lot bands and assign a home — fit is checked against footprint & setbacks.

Manual adjustments

Project-team overrides — headworks, contingency, site premiums (Jeffrey & PMs).

Default setbacks & contingency

Applied to new lot bands; each band can override its own setbacks above.
Delivery program · logistics & timeline

China to site

The end-to-end delivery route and program — factory manufacture in China, ocean freight to Australia, and site works through to handover. Drag bars to move, click a row to edit phase, dates, owner and notes.

Logistics route

Delivery timeline — drag bars to move · click a row to edit
